# jira-epic-generator


Generate Jira Epic and Task definitions from context using templates. Creates markdown artifacts under .codi/jira/issues/ with unique identifiers.



## Triggers

- create epic

- generate epic

- jira epic

- crear epic

- generar epic




## What I do

- Parse free-form context into structured Epic + Tasks definition.

- Resolve PROJECT_KEY dynamically from Jira via MCP (getVisibleJiraProjects).

- Generate unique filenames with slug + shortuuid under .codi/jira/issues/.

- Render Epic and Task markdown artifacts using EPIC.md.tpl and TASK.md.tpl templates.

- Ensure idempotent generation — regenerate shortuuid if file already exists.




## Usage examples

- Crear un epic para migrar a Rust con tareas: crear repositorio, implementar test automation, crear un MCP con Rust.

- Generate an epic for the database migration project with all subtasks.
